topic.title: Second Half Assignments & Final Exam — Now Published
topic.text:
Hi all,

Assignments 7 through 10 and the Final Exam are live on Canvas. This is the second half of the semester, and it's where everything comes together — brand identity, storytelling, digital presence, and your Madison tool demo.

Here's your roadmap:

• Assignment 7: Brand Identity Implementation — due March 20
• Assignment 8: Brand-Aligned Digital Presence — due March 27
• Assignment 9: Brand Storytelling & Content Strategy — due April 3
• Assignment 10: Substack Launch & Thought Leadership — due April 10
• Final Exam Presentations — April 18 & April 25

Some of you are already ahead of the curve — publishing Substack articles, building out your LinkedIn presence, and diving into your brand identities. That's exactly the energy we want. Keep going.

Finals: Two Presentation Days

Final presentations will be held on two separate Saturdays:

• Group 1: April 18, 2026
• Group 2: April 25, 2026

Groups will be assigned alphabetically. However, if you have a strong preference for a specific day, let me know now. It's first come, first served — so don't wait.

Read through all the assignments. The rubrics are detailed and the expectations are outlined.

Thanks, Prof. Nik & Nina
